allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/books -F 'title=El Principito' -F 'author=Antoine de Saint-Exupery' -F originalPrice=1500 -F price=1350)

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/books -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Cien años de soledad","author":"Gabriel Garcia Marquez","originalPrice":2000,"price":1800,"photo":null}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/books -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Cien anios de soledad","author":"Garcia Marquez","originalPrice":2000,"price":1800,"photo":null}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3000/api/books -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"title":"Cien anios de soledad","author":"Garcia Marquez","originalPrice":2000,"price":1800}')
